code:
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR

    [*] --> NEW: Thread created
    NEW --> RUNNABLE: thread.start()

    subgraph Thread Scheduler
        RUNNABLE
        RUNNING
    end

    RUNNABLE --> RUNNING: CPU time allocated
    RUNNING --> RUNNABLE: Yield / Time slice end

    RUNNING --> BLOCKED: Enters synchronized block
    BLOCKED --> RUNNABLE: Exits synchronized block

    RUNNING --> WAITING: object.wait()
    WAITING --> RUNNABLE: object.notify() / notifyAll()

    RUNNING --> TIMED_WAITING: Thread.sleep(t) / object.wait(t)
    TIMED_WAITING --> RUNNABLE: Timeout / notify()

    RUNNING --> TERMINATED: run() completes
    TERMINATED --> [*]
repo_description: Project for all the article details I have learn day by day

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个Java线程状态流转图，帮助团队理解线程生命周期。从线程创建开始，经过NEW、RUNNABLE这些状态，最终到TERMINATED。关键是要把调度器里的RUNNABLE和RUNNING单独框出来，因为这是操作系统层面的概念。
明白。我注意到RUNNABLE和RUNNING都在调度器子图里，那从RUNNABLE到RUNNING的转换条件是"CPU time allocated"对吗？另外BLOCKED、WAITING、TIMED_WAITING这些阻塞状态应该放在子图外面？
对的，阻塞状态都在子图外面。RUNNING状态可以走向三个阻塞分支：进入synchronized块变成BLOCKED，调用wait()变成WAITING，调用sleep()或带超时的wait()变成TIMED_WAITING。每个都要有明确的恢复路径回到RUNNABLE。
好的，我先把主框架画出来：起点到NEW是"Thread created"，NEW到RUNNABLE是thread.start()。调度器子图包含RUNNABLE和RUNNING，方向从左到右。RUNNING到BLOCKED标注"Enters synchronized block"，BLOCKED回到RUNNABLE是"Exits synchronized block"。
WAITING和TIMED_WAITING的恢复条件要区分清楚。WAITING只能被notify()或notifyAll()唤醒，而TIMED_WAITING除了notify()还可以是超时。另外RUNNING到TERMINATED的条件是run()方法执行完毕，这个别漏了。
已添加：RUNNING到WAITING标注"object.wait()"，WAITING到RUNNABLE是"object.notify() / notifyAll()"。RUNNING到TIMED_WAITING写"Thread.sleep(t) / object.wait(t)"，回来是"Timeout / notify()"。TERMINATED也连好了，最后回到终点。
等等，RUNNING回到RUNNABLE的条件我写的是"Yield / Time slice end"，你目前只写了前半部分？还有RUNNING到TERMINATED的条件确认一下，应该是run() completes。
修正好了。RUNNING到RUNNABLE现在完整标注"Yield / Time slice end"，RUNNING到TERMINATED是"run() completes"。整个状态图现在涵盖了线程从创建到终止的完整生命周期，所有状态转换条件都对应JDK标准定义。
